MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Mission Bay Housing, is present. Represented by Meilma Talian
Attorney, Shawn Bankson, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Mary Benedetto, is present.
Attorney, Suzanne Rode, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JAN-10-2010 is vacated.
